data.title: FTP Transfer
data.notes: Upload, download, list, and delete files on FTP and FTPS servers.

params.title: FTP Hostname
params.caption: Remote FTP hostname or IP address, e.g. `ftp.example.com` or `10.0.0.25`.

params.title: Username
params.caption: The FTP username to connect with.  Leave blank to use `FTP_USER` secret variable.

params.title: Password
params.caption: Optional FTP password. For production use, prefer setting `FTP_PASSWORD` in a xyOps Secret Vault.

params.title: Port
params.caption: The FTP TCP port. Plain FTP and explicit FTPS usually use `21`; implicit FTPS often uses `990`.

params.title: Security Mode
params.value: Plain FTP [false], Explicit FTPS [true], Implicit FTPS [implicit]
params.caption: Choose plain FTP or FTPS. FTPS is strongly recommended when your server supports it.

params.title: Reject Unauthorized TLS Certs
params.caption: When using FTPS, reject self-signed or otherwise untrusted TLS certificates.

params.title: Timeout (sec)
params.caption: How long to wait for FTP commands before timing out.

params.title: Verbose Logging
params.caption: Log FTP protocol details to the job log. Passwords are redacted.

params.title: Allow Separate Transfer Host
params.caption: Advanced: allow the FTP server to redirect data transfers to another host. Only enable this for servers you trust.

params.title: Tool Select
params.caption: Select which FTP operation to perform.

tools.title: Upload Files
tools.description: Upload job input files or local files to an FTP server.

fields.title: Local Path
fields.caption: The local file or directory to upload from. Leave blank to use the xyOps job temp directory and job input files.

fields.title: Filename Pattern
fields.caption: Optionally filter local files using a glob pattern, e.g. `*.csv` or `*.txt,*.log`.

fields.title: Remote Path
fields.caption: Remote FTP directory to upload into. Leave blank to use the FTP login directory.

fields.title: Include Subfolders
fields.caption: Upload matching files from subdirectories too, preserving their relative paths.

tools.title: Download Files
tools.description: Download FTP files to disk, optionally attaching them to the job output.

fields.title: Remote Path
fields.caption: Remote FTP directory to download from. Leave blank to use the FTP login directory.

fields.title: Filename Pattern
fields.caption: Optionally filter remote files using a glob pattern, e.g. `*.csv` or `*.txt,*.log`.

fields.title: Local Path
fields.caption: Local directory to save downloaded files in. Leave blank to use the xyOps job temp directory.

fields.title: Include Subfolders
fields.caption: Download matching files from subdirectories too, preserving their relative paths.

fields.title: Delete Files
fields.caption: Delete each remote FTP file after it is successfully downloaded.

fields.title: Attach Files
fields.caption: Attach downloaded files to the xyOps job output for downstream workflow steps.

fields.title: Maximum Files
fields.caption: Optionally set a maximum number of files to download. `0` means no limit.

fields.title: Sort Files
fields.value: Name / Path [path], Newest First [newest], Oldest First [oldest], Largest First [largest], Smallest First [smallest]
fields.caption: Optionally sort the files before downloading. Useful when combined with maximum.

tools.title: List Files
tools.description: List remote FTP files with optional filters and return metadata.

fields.title: Remote Path
fields.caption: Remote FTP directory to list. Leave blank to use the FTP login directory.

fields.title: Filename Pattern
fields.caption: Optionally filter remote files using a glob pattern, e.g. `*.csv` or `*.txt,*.log`.

fields.title: Include Subfolders
fields.caption: List matching files from subdirectories too.

fields.title: Older Than
fields.caption: Optionally include only files older than this relative time, e.g. `7 days` or `3600`.

fields.title: Newer Than
fields.caption: Optionally include only files newer than this relative time, e.g. `2 hours` or `900`.

fields.title: Maximum Files
fields.caption: Optionally set a maximum number of files to return. `0` means no limit.

fields.title: Sort Files
fields.value: Name / Path [path], Newest First [newest], Oldest First [oldest], Largest First [largest], Smallest First [smallest]
fields.caption: Optionally sort the files before returning metadata.

tools.title: Delete Files
tools.description: Delete remote FTP files with optional filters.

fields.title: Remote Path
fields.caption: Remote FTP directory to delete from. Leave blank to use the FTP login directory.

fields.title: Filename Pattern
fields.caption: Optionally filter remote files using a glob pattern, e.g. `*.tmp` or `*.bak,*.old`.

fields.title: Include Subfolders
fields.caption: Delete matching files from subdirectories too.

fields.title: Older Than
fields.caption: Optionally delete only files older than this relative time, e.g. `30 days` or `86400`.

fields.title: Newer Than
fields.caption: Optionally delete only files newer than this relative time, e.g. `1 hour` or `3600`.

fields.title: Maximum Files
fields.caption: Optionally set a maximum number of files to delete. `0` means no limit.

fields.title: Sort Files
fields.value: Oldest First [oldest], Newest First [newest], Name / Path [path], Largest First [largest], Smallest First [smallest]
fields.caption: Optionally sort the files before deleting. Useful when combined with maximum.

fields.title: Dry Run
fields.caption: Preview matched files without actually deleting anything.
